languages.text: "Протокол 17.09. Мирские рабочие единицы, соприкоснувшиеся со скверной ксеноереси, будут утилизированы вместе со станцией". {n}Альва-9 равнодушно пробегает по мрачным лицам рабочих взглядом алых визоров. {/n}

traits.locale_text: потонет нахрен вместе с нами во имя Омниссии

languages.text: "Protocol 17.09. Laity worker units that have come into contact with the foulness of xenoheresy will be disposed of along with the station." {n}Alva-9 casts her crimson visors detachedly over the grim faces of the workers. {/n}
languages.original_text: "Протокол 17.09. Мирские рабочие единицы, соприкоснувшиеся со скверной ксеноереси, будут утилизированы вместе со станцией". {n}Альва-9 равнодушно пробегает по мрачным лицам рабочих взглядом алых визоров. {/n}

languages.text: 「プロトコル17.09.異教の穢れに触れた教徒のユニットは、基地と共に処分される」{n}アルバ-9は、教徒たちの厳しい顔を見下ろしながら、赤いバイザーを冷淡に外す。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol 17.09. Laity worker units that have come into contact with the foulness of xenoheresy will be disposed of along with the station." {n}Alva-9 casts her crimson visors detachedly over the grim faces of the workers. {/n}

traits.locale_text: 「プロトコル17.09.異教の穢れに触れた教徒のユニットは、基地と共に処分される。」{n}アルバ-9は、教徒たちの厳しい顔を見下ろしながら、赤いバイザーを冷淡に外す。{/n}

languages.text: «Protocolo 17.09. Los trabajadores laicos que han entrado en contacto con la vil xenoherejía serán desechados junto con la estación». {n}Alva-9 dirige sus visores carmesíes a los sombríos rostros de los trabajadores con indiferencia.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol 17.09. Laity worker units that have come into contact with the foulness of xenoheresy will be disposed of along with the station." {n}Alva-9 casts her crimson visors detachedly over the grim faces of the workers. {/n}

traits.locale_text: «Protocolo 17.09. Los trabajadores laicos que han entrado en contacto con la vil xenoherejía serán desechados junto con la estación». {n}Alva-9 dirige sus visores carmesíes a los sombríos rostros de los trabajadores con indiferencia.{/n}

languages.text: “17.09协议。凡接触异形造物的教外人劳工单位，须随星站一同处置。”{n}阿尔瓦-9猩红的目镜冷漠地扫过工人们阴沉的面孔。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol 17.09. Laity worker units that have come into contact with the foulness of xenoheresy will be disposed of along with the station." {n}Alva-9 casts her crimson visors detachedly over the grim faces of the workers. {/n}

traits.locale_text: “17.09协议。凡接触异形造物的教外人劳工单位，须随星站一同处置。”{n}阿尔瓦-9猩红的目镜冷漠地扫过工人们阴沉的面孔。{/n}

languages.text: "Protokoll 17.09. Laienarbeiter, die mit schädlicher Xeno-Ketzerei in Berührung kamen, werden mit der Station selbst vernichtet." {n}Alva-9 lässt ihre blutroten Visoren über die grimmigen Gesichter der Arbeiter schweifen. {/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol 17.09. Laity worker units that have come into contact with the foulness of xenoheresy will be disposed of along with the station." {n}Alva-9 casts her crimson visors detachedly over the grim faces of the workers. {/n}

traits.locale_text: "Protokoll 17.09. Laienarbeiter, die mit schädlicher Xeno-Ketzerei in Berührung kamen, werden mit der Station selbst vernichtet." {n}Alva-9 lässt ihre blutroten Visoren über die grimmigen Gesichter der Arbeiter schweifen. {/n}

languages.text: "Protokol 17.09. Zeno kâfirliğinin pisliğiyle temas etmiş sıradan işçi birimleri, istasyonla birlikte bertaraf edilecek." {n}Alva-9, kızıl vizörlerini işçilerin asık suratlı yüzlerinde ilgisizce gezdiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol 17.09. Laity worker units that have come into contact with the foulness of xenoheresy will be disposed of along with the station." {n}Alva-9 casts her crimson visors detachedly over the grim faces of the workers. {/n}

traits.locale_text: "Protokol 17.09. Zeno kâfirliğinin pisliğiyle temas etmiş sıradan işçi birimleri, istasyonla birlikte bertaraf edilecek." {n}Alva-9, kızıl vizörlerini işçilerin asık suratlı yüzlerinde ilgisizce gezdiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Protocole 17.09. Les unités ouvrières profanes qui ont été en contact avec de la xénohérésie seront détruites avec la station. » {n}À travers ses viseurs écarlates, Alva-9 lance un regard détaché sur les visages sombres des ouvriers.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Protocol 17.09. Laity worker units that have come into contact with the foulness of xenoheresy will be disposed of along with the station." {n}Alva-9 casts her crimson visors detachedly over the grim faces of the workers. {/n}
